message:
feat(http/h1): add streaming body types for incremental I/O

Introduce streaming request/response types for HTTP/1.1 that enable
efficient incremental body reading and writing without buffering
entire payloads in memory.

New types in stream module:
- StreamingRequest/StreamingResponse: Full request/response with
  streaming body access
- RequestHead/ResponseHead: Headers-only types for early processing
- IncomingBody: Async reader for request/response bodies
- OutgoingBody: Async writer for streaming responses
- ChunkedEncoder: Transfer-Encoding: chunked writer
- BodyKind: Enum for Content-Length, Chunked, or Close-delimited

Module exports updated to expose new streaming types alongside
the existing buffered API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
